excerpt: The Qur'an is what was revealed in Arabic. It will not be translated into any language, it will not be called the Qur'an. This is the reason why Arabic verses of the Qur'an have been made obligatory in prayer.
source_location_hint: Legal doctrines on recitation and prayer validity

excerpt: Different terms have been assigned to the verses according to their place of revelation, circumstances and times.

The pen (the first intellect) wrote down the entire meaning of the Qur'an on the preserved tablet in the night of Qadr... Then Allah revealed these meanings slowly to the pure heart of the Messenger of Allah over a period of 23 years.
source_location_hint: On the temporal descent of revelation and the intelligible realm
